answer: Gladly does not offer a free tier for its enterprise-focused developer API. API access is intended for customers with existing platform subscriptions, which typically require annual contracts and multi-seat minimums [1][2][3]. While Gladly recently launched a version for smaller businesses via a Shopify app—which includes a 30-day trial and limited AI interactions—it does not provide a public self-serve developer plan [4]. Developers can test integrations in a secure sandbox environment at https://{organization}.gladly.qa once they have an active account with the necessary API User permissions [5][6].
